title: Loot Bags
description: Discover rare loot bags from mob kills! Hunt for mobs and find epic rewards in these Loot Bags.
body:
![Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23d542f4d83a4ffc01d73185cd67b7208b880c25_0.webp)

# Loot Bags!
Discover six new types of loot bags—Common, Uncommon, Rare, Health, Epic and Mythic—when you defeat mobs! Each bag holds exciting and *balanced* rewards.

## Varying Drop Rates
Not all mobs drop loot bags. Some are rarer than others, making every kill a thrilling chance for a special prize!
![loot bags](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a95706670ece48bd1a1d83c36c044f25a2f6eb2.png)

## Hunt for Rewards
Keep your eyes peeled and your sword sharp. The rarer the loot bag, the greater the reward! Happy hunting!

## Cheats
To get all available loot bags, type the following command:

`/function loot_bags:cheat/give_all`

## Config
To modify the drop rates of the loot bags:
- Go to the datapack folder, then navigate to `Loot Bags [DP]/data/loot_bags/function/kill_entity`.  
You will find three files: Easy, Medium, and Hard.

...

`execute store result score $x __variable__ run random value 1..<value to modify>`

...

**To increase the chances of getting a loot bag, decrease the value <value to modify>.**  
And do the opposite for each difficulty level.

## Uninstalling
1. Access the Chat Window.
2. Enter the Uninstall Command and press Enter: 
`
/function lbags:uninstall
`
